description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult male pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a twisted torso. The head is bald with a beard, and the face is clearly visible, but the body is unnaturally stretched and contorted, giving a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The upper body and arms are extended into long, V-shaped forms, while the lower body twists dramatically, with the legs appearing to spiral and taper off. The clothing consists of a long-sleeved top and pants, both tightly fitted to the distorted body shape. The feet are pointed and asymmetrical, further emphasizing the object's warped proportions. The overall form is humanoid but highly stylized, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A surreal, distorted adult male figure with elongated limbs, twisted torso, and fitted clothing, featuring a bald head and beard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, beard, and the dramatic V-shaped extension of the arms, with the twisted torso and asymmetrical legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme elongation of the arms and the spiral twist of the lower body, with the head in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and the full extent of the arm and torso distortion, with both legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the profile of the head and beard, the exaggerated arm extension, and the spiral form of the legs.
